title: Availability
description: Availability information for a provider location, returned by /v1/provider_locations/availability. Contains a list of bookable timeslots.

timeslots.description: List of available appointment start times within the requested date range.

Timeslot.title: Timeslot
Timeslot.description: A single bookable appointment start time.

start_time.description: Appointment start time in ISO-8601 format with provider's local timezone offset.

visit_reason_id.description: Zocdoc visit reason ID this timeslot is valid for.

booking_url.description: Deep link URL to book this specific timeslot on zocdoc.com. Non-PHI. UTM parameters are automatically added.
